gaps.description: While many fragments mention silk scarves, most are dedicated to techniques or care. A single, comprehensive product overview page for the collection itself is missing.
gaps.suggestedAction: Write a 200-word fr-fr product-story fragment covering "foulards en soie", applying premium-tone.
